scripts.db:push: dotenv -- pnpm --filter @ubos/db exec prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -- pnpm --filter @ubos/db exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -- pnpm --filter @ubos/db exec prisma studio --schema prisma/schema.prisma
